policies.title: Auto-approval threshold
policies.description: Claims at or below MYR 500 with complete documentation may be auto-approved.

policies.title: Manager escalation
policies.description: Claims above MYR 500 and at or below MYR 5000 require manager approval.

policies.title: Finance escalation
policies.description: Claims above MYR 5000 require finance controller approval.

policies.title: Business justification required
policies.description: All reimbursements must include a business justification of at least 10 characters.

policies.title: Approved category list
policies.description: Subscriptions must fall into one of: productivity, design, engineering, ai_tools, communication, analytics, security.

policies.title: No duplicate active subscription
policies.description: Employees may not claim for a SaaS product the organisation already licenses and can extend a seat on.

policies.title: Receipt required above MYR 100
policies.description: Any claim over MYR 100 requires a receipt or invoice.

policies.title: Annual plan preference
policies.description: For recurring SaaS over MYR 200/month, annual billing should be preferred when discount is meaningful.
